description: Composition Black top made of blended fabric, has a notched collar, long sleeves, a buttonable key hole detail at the cuffs and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a vintage vibe, this top from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a flowy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. For a formal or casual feel wear this with denims or formal pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
